title: AI Traffic Light
description: Not all uses of AI are the same. Some are great, others are dangerous!
rules: For each situation, choose the traffic light color: 🟢 GREEN = Great use! 🟡 YELLOW = Caution! 🔴 RED = Danger!

questions.scenario: You use AI to explain a science topic you didn't understand well.
questions.explanation: AI is a great tutor! It can explain things in different ways until you understand. 💡

questions.scenario: You copy and paste an essay written by AI and submit it to your teacher as your own.
questions.explanation: That's CHEATING! The assignment should be YOUR work. AI can help you understand, but it shouldn't do the work for you. 🚫

questions.scenario: You ask AI for story ideas and then write the story yourself in your own words.
questions.explanation: Perfect! Using AI for inspiration and then creating something of your own is a smart use! ✨

questions.scenario: A friend sends you a photo of a classmate modified with AI to make fun of them.
questions.explanation: That's CYBERBULLYING! Modifying photos of other people with AI to offend them is very serious and hurtful. 💔

questions.scenario: You use AI to translate a sentence into another language, but then check with a dictionary if it's correct.
questions.explanation: Good idea to check! AI sometimes makes translation mistakes. Verifying is always important! 🔍

questions.scenario: You believe everything AI tells you without ever verifying.
questions.explanation: AI can MAKE UP things that seem true! You should always verify important information. 🧐
